#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

resolve_script_dir() {
  local source="${BASH_SOURCE[0]}"
  while [[ -L "$source" ]]; do
    local dir
    dir="$(cd -P "$(dirname "$source")" && pwd)"
    source="$(readlink "$source")"
    [[ "$source" != /* ]] && source="$dir/$source"
  done
  cd -P "$(dirname "$source")" && pwd
}

# Use HELIX_ROOT if set (e.g., by bin/helix plugin wrapper), otherwise
# resolve from this script's location.
if [[ -n "${HELIX_ROOT:-}" ]]; then
  library_root="$HELIX_ROOT"
else
  script_dir="$(resolve_script_dir)"
  library_root="$(cd "$script_dir/.." && pwd)"
fi
HELIX_VERSION="0.3.3"
helix_docs_root="${HELIX_LIBRARY_ROOT:-$library_root/workflows}"
target_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"

# DDx bead-backed tracker settings
tracker_dir="${DDX_BEAD_DIR:-${HELIX_TRACKER_DIR:-${target_root}/.ddx}}"
tracker_file="${tracker_dir}/beads.jsonl"
export DDX_BEAD_DIR="$tracker_dir"

canonicalize_path() {
  local path="$1"
  local dir
  dir="$(cd "$(dirname "$path")" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P)" || return 1
  printf '%s/%s\n' "$dir" "$(basename "$path")"
}

path_is_within_root() {
  local path="$1"
  local root="$2"
  local resolved_path
  local resolved_root

  resolved_path="$(canonicalize_path "$path")" || return 1
  resolved_root="$(cd "$root" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P)" || return 1

  case "$resolved_path" in
    "$resolved_root" | "$resolved_root"/*) return 0 ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}

normalize_agent_name() {
  # Normalize DDx-embedded-harness aliases to the canonical HELIX name "agent".
  # ddx-agent, agent, embedded, and legacy forge all map to "agent".
  # All other harness names pass through unchanged.
  case "${1:-}" in
    ddx-agent|agent|embedded|forge) printf 'agent' ;;
    *) printf '%s' "${1:-}" ;;
  esac
}

agent="$(normalize_agent_name "${HELIX_AGENT:-codex}")"
agent_model="${HELIX_MODEL:-}"
agent_effort="${HELIX_EFFORT:-}"
review_every=15
force_ephemeral="${HELIX_FORCE_EPHEMERAL:-0}"
session_active=0  # 1 = reusable session exists for the current epic
max_cycles=0
auto_align="${HELIX_AUTO_ALIGN:-1}"
auto_review=1
review_threshold=100

# DDx embedded-harness alias handling.
# HELIX should accept the user-facing rename direction (`ddx-agent`) while still
# working against older DDx binaries that expose the embedded harness as `forge`.
_is_ddx_embedded_alias() {
  case "${1:-}" in
    ddx-agent|agent|embedded|forge)
      return 0
      ;;
    *)
      return 1
      ;;
  esac
}

declare -A _ddx_harness_alias_cache 2>/dev/null || true
_resolve_ddx_dispatch_harness() {
  local requested="${1:-}"
  [[ -z "$requested" ]] && return 0
  if ! _is_ddx_embedded_alias "$requested"; then
    printf '%s' "$requested"
    return 0
  fi
  if [[ -v "_ddx_harness_alias_cache[$requested]" ]]; then
    printf '%s' "${_ddx_harness_alias_cache[$requested]}"
    return 0
  fi

219	usage() {
220	  cat <<EOF
221	Usage:
222	  helix run [--agent <harness>] [--review-every N] [--max-cycles N] [--no-auto-align] [--no-auto-review] [--summary] [--dry-run]
223	  helix input [--agent <harness>] [--autonomy low|medium|high] "natural language request"
224	  helix frame [--agent <harness>] [scope]
225	  helix build [--agent <harness>] [selector]
226	  helix check [--agent <harness>] [scope]
227	  helix align [--agent <harness>] [scope]
228	  helix backfill [--agent <harness>] [scope]
229	  helix design [--agent <harness>] [--rounds N] [scope]
230	  helix polish [--agent <harness>] [--rounds N] [scope]
231	  helix doctor [--fix]
232	  helix start [helix run options...]
233	  helix stop
234	  helix status [--json]
235	  helix next
236	  helix review [--agent <harness>] [scope]
237	  helix experiment [--agent <harness>] [--close] [issue-id|goal]
238	  helix evolve [--agent <harness>] [--scope S] [--artifact ID] [--from source] "requirement"
239	  helix commit [--agent <harness>] [issue-id]
240	  helix triage "Title" [--type task|epic|bug|chore] [ddx bead create options...]
241	  ddx bead <command> [args...]
242	  helix help
243	
244	Commands:
245	  run         Loop over ready HELIX work, then check whether to continue
246	  doctor      Check installation health; --fix auto-repairs plugin symlinks and skills
247	  start       Launch helix run as a background process (PID file written)
248	  stop        Kill the background helix run cleanly
249	  input       Accept sparse intent and shape governed HELIX work
250	  frame       Create or refine product vision, PRD, and feature specs
251	  build       Run one bounded implementation pass
252	  check       Run the bounded HELIX queue-health check
253	  align       Run reconcile-alignment for a scope (default: repo)
254	  backfill    Run documentation backfill for a scope (default: repo)
255	  design      Create a comprehensive design document through iterative refinement
256	  polish      Refine issues before implementation (dedup, coverage, criteria)
257	  next        Show recommended next issue
258	  review      Fresh-eyes review of recent work
259	  experiment  Run one experiment iteration for metric-driven optimization
260	  evolve      Thread a new requirement through the artifact stack
261	  commit      Commit with HELIX format, run build gate, push, close issue
262	  triage      Create a bead via ddx bead create
263	
264	Options:
265	  --agent           Agent harness to use: codex, claude, ddx-agent,
266	                    embedded, or any harness from \`ddx agent list\`
267	                    (default: ${agent})
268	  --claude          Shorthand for --agent claude
269	  --codex           Shorthand for --agent codex
270	  --ddx-agent       Shorthand for --agent ddx-agent
271	  --embedded        Shorthand for --agent embedded
272	  --forge           Deprecated alias for the embedded DDx agent harness
273	  --model           Explicit model override to pass through to DDx / the harness
274	  --effort          Reasoning effort: low, medium, high, max (defaults vary by action)
275	  --review-every    Run alignment every N completed implementation cycles
276	  --max-cycles      Stop after N completed implementation cycles
277	  --no-auto-align   Do not auto-run alignment when check returns ALIGN
278	  --no-auto-review  Do not run fresh-eyes review after each implementation
279	  --review-threshold N  Skip review for changes below N lines (default: 100)
280	  --review-agent    Use a different agent for reviews (default: adversarial alternate)
281	  --dry-run         Print the agent command instead of executing it
282	  --quiet, -q       Suppress progress output (command echo, prompt sizes)
283	  --summary, -s     Concise output with log-file line pointers (implies --quiet)
284	
285	Environment:
286	  HELIX_AGENT          Default primary agent (codex, claude, ddx-agent,
287	                       or any ddx harness)
288	  HELIX_ALT_AGENT      Alternate agent for adversarial rotation (auto-detected)
289	  HELIX_AGENT_TIMEOUT  Agent timeout in seconds (default: 2700)
290	  HELIX_MODEL          Optional model override passed through to DDx / the harness
291	  HELIX_EFFORT         Optional effort override passed through to DDx / the harness
292	  HELIX_LIBRARY_ROOT   Override the library root that contains workflows/
293	  HELIX_TRACKER_DIR    Override the tracker directory (default: <repo>/.ddx)
294	
295	Adversarial rotation:
296	  Primary agent handles frame/design/evolve/align/review.
297	  Alternate agent handles build/polish/check.
298	  Concrete model selection stays with DDx or the harness unless you pass --model.
299	
300	Logs:
301	  Session logs are written to .helix-logs/helix-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.log
302	  in the project root. All stderr output is captured for post-hoc inspection.
303	
304	Notes:
305	  \`helix run\` remains a compatibility wrapper for supervisory routing, but
306	  build cycles delegate to \`ddx agent execute-loop --once\` when that DDx
307	  surface is available.
308	  \`helix build\` remains a compatibility wrapper for one bounded pass and
309	  delegates to \`ddx agent execute-bead\` after resolving a matching ready bead
310	  when that DDx surface is available.
311	  Codex runs as \`codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox exec\`.
312	  Any harness listed by \`ddx agent list\` can be passed to --agent.
313	  \`ddx-agent\`, \`embedded\`, and legacy \`forge\` are resolved against the live DDx embedded harness name.
314	  When HELIX dispatches through DDx, default model selection is delegated to DDx unless you pass an explicit override.
315	EOF
316	}

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	export DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK=1
5	
6	# Defensive wrapper: strip advisory lines (upgrade notices) from ddx stdout
7	# before they reach JSON consumers. DDx guards these with an isatty check, but
8	# helix also filters defensively via strip_advisory in tracker_exec. This
9	# wrapper keeps the test environment safe regardless of DDx version.
10	ddx() {
11	  local _ddx_out _ddx_rc=0
12	  _ddx_out="$(command ddx "$@")" || _ddx_rc=$?
13	  printf '%s\n' "$_ddx_out" | grep -v '^💡\|^⬆️' || true
14	  return "$_ddx_rc"
15	}
16	export -f ddx
17	
18	repo_root="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
19	test_count=0
20	
21	fail() {
22	  echo "FAIL: $*" >&2
23	  exit 1
24	}
25	
26	assert_eq() {
27	  local expected="$1"
28	  local actual="$2"
29	  local message="$3"
30	  if [[ "$expected" != "$actual" ]]; then
31	    printf 'expected:\n%s\nactual:\n%s\n' "$expected" "$actual" >&2
32	    fail "$message"
33	  fi
34	}
35	
36	assert_contains() {
37	  local haystack="$1"
38	  local needle="$2"
39	  local message="$3"
40	  if [[ "$haystack" != *"$needle"* ]]; then
41	    printf 'missing substring: %s\nin:\n%s\n' "$needle" "$haystack" >&2
42	    fail "$message"
43	  fi
44	}
45	
46	assert_not_contains() {
47	  local haystack="$1"
48	  local needle="$2"
49	  local message="$3"
50	  if [[ "$haystack" == *"$needle"* ]]; then
51	    printf 'unexpected substring: %s\nin:\n%s\n' "$needle" "$haystack" >&2
52	    fail "$message"
53	  fi
54	}
55	
56	assert_file_exists() {
57	  local path="$1"
58	  local message="$2"
59	  [[ -f "$path" ]] || fail "$message"
60	}
61	
62	assert_file_contains() {
63	  local path="$1"
64	  local needle="$2"
65	  local message="$3"
66	  [[ -f "$path" ]] || fail "$message"
67	  local content
68	  content="$(cat "$path")"
69	  assert_contains "$content" "$needle" "$message"
70	}
71	
72	assert_fails() {
73	  local message="$1"
74	  shift
75	  if "$@"; then
76	    fail "$message"
77	  fi
78	}
79

81	  local root="$1"
82	  local real_ddx
83	  real_ddx="$(type -P ddx)"
84	  mkdir -p "$root/bin" "$root/state"
85	
86	  cat >"$root/bin/codex" <<'EOF'
87	#!/usr/bin/env bash
88	set -euo pipefail
89	
90	state_root="${MOCK_STATE_ROOT:?}"

92	if [[ "$*" != *"--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox"* ]]; then
93	  echo "mock codex expected --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox" >&2
94	  exit 1
95	fi
96	
97	
98	payload="$*"
99	mode="${MOCK_BACKFILL_MODE:-complete}"
100	
101	record() {
102	  printf '%s\n' "$1" >> "$state_root/calls.log"
103	}

105	next_action() {
106	  local file="$state_root/next-actions"
107	  if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
108	    echo STOP
109	    return
110	  fi
111	  head -n1 "$file"
112	  tail -n +2 "$file" > "$file.tmp" || true
113	  mv "$file.tmp" "$file"
114	}

600	  )

603	run_helix_with_envs() {
604	  local root="$1"
605	  shift
606	  local env_args=()
607	  while [[ $# -gt 0 ]] && [[ "$1" != "--" ]]; do
608	    env_args+=("$1")
609	    shift
610	  done
611	  if [[ "${1:-}" != "--" ]]; then
612	    fail "run_helix_with_envs requires -- before command arguments"
613	  fi
614	  shift
615	  local cmd="${1:-help}"
616	  shift || true
617	  (
618	    cd "$root/work"

640	test_help() {
641	  local root
642	  root="$(make_workspace)"
643	  local output
644	  output="$(run_helix "$root" help)"
645	  assert_contains "$output" "helix run" "help should list run command"
646	  assert_contains "$output" "helix input [--agent <harness>] [--autonomy low|medium|high] \"natural language request\"" "help should advertise input usage"
647	  assert_contains "$output" "helix commit [--agent <harness>] [issue-id]" "help should advertise commit usage"
648	  assert_contains "$output" "input       Accept sparse intent and shape governed HELIX work" "help should describe input command"
649	  assert_contains "$output" "\`helix run\` remains a compatibility wrapper for supervisory routing" "help should document the run compatibility boundary"
650	  assert_contains "$output" "\`helix build\` remains a compatibility wrapper for one bounded pass" "help should document the build compatibility boundary"
651	  assert_contains "$output" "--model" "help should list the generic model override"
652	  assert_contains "$output" "HELIX_MODEL" "help should list the generic model environment override"
653	  assert_contains "$output" "--review-every" "help should list review option"
654	  assert_not_contains "$output" "--smart-model" "help should not advertise removed stage-model overrides"
655	  assert_not_contains "$output" "HELIX_SMART_MODEL" "help should not advertise removed stage-model env overrides"
656	  assert_not_contains "$output" $'\n  tracker ' "help should not list tracker command"
657	  rm -rf "$root"
658	}
659	
660	test_no_hardcoded_bead_prefix_export() {
661	  local script
662	  script="$(cat "$repo_root/scripts/helix")"
663	  assert_not_contains "$script" 'export DDX_BEAD_PREFIX=' \
664	    "helix should not hard-code DDX_BEAD_PREFIX"
665	  assert_not_contains "$script" 'HELIX_SMART_MODEL' \
666	    "helix should not retain the removed reasoning-stage model override"
667	  assert_not_contains "$script" 'HELIX_CHEAP_MODEL' \
668	    "helix should not retain the removed mechanical-stage model override"
669	}

504	make_workspace() {
505	  cd "$repo_root" 2>/dev/null || true
506	  local root
507	  root="$(mktemp -d)"
508	  mkdir -p "$root/work"
509	  make_mock_bin "$root"
510	  (
511	    cd "$root/work"
512	    git init -q
513	  )
514	  echo "$root"
515	}
516	
517	# Seed the built-in tracker with ready issues for loop tests
518	seed_tracker() {
519	  local root="$1"
520	  local count="${2:-0}"
521	  local work_dir="$root/work"
522	  mkdir -p "$work_dir/.ddx"
523	  local i
524	  for ((i = 0; i < count; i++)); do
525	    printf '{"id":"hx-mock-%d","title":"mock issue %d","issue_type":"task","status":"open","priority":2,"labels":["helix","phase:build","kind:build"],"parent":"","spec-id":"","description":"","design":"","acceptance":"","dependencies":[],"owner":"","notes":"","execution-eligible":true,"superseded-by":"","replaces":"","created_at":"2099-01-01T00:00:00Z","updated_at":"2099-01-01T00:00:00Z"}\n' "$i" "$i"
526	  done > "$work_dir/.ddx/beads.jsonl"
527	}
528	
529	# Close all tracker issues (simulates agent completing work)
530	close_all_issues() {
531	  local work_dir="$1/work"
532	  if [[ -f "$work_dir/.ddx/beads.jsonl" ]]; then
533	    local tmp
534	    tmp="$(ddx jq -c '.status = "closed"' "$work_dir/.ddx/beads.jsonl")"
535	    printf '%s\n' "$tmp" > "$work_dir/.ddx/beads.jsonl"
536	  fi
537	}
538	
539	run_helix() {
540	  local root="$1"
541	  shift
542	  local cmd="${1:-help}"
543	  shift || true
544	  (
545	    cd "$root/work"
546	    HOME="$root/home" \
547	    PATH="$root/bin:$PATH" \
548	    MOCK_STATE_ROOT="$root/state" \
549	    HELIX_LIBRARY_ROOT="$repo_root/workflows" \
550	    HELIX_FORCE_EPHEMERAL=1 \
551	    HELIX_REVIEW_AGENT="codex" \
552	    HELIX_ALT_AGENT="none" \
553	    HELIX_DIRECT_AGENT=1 \
554	    HELIX_AUTO_ALIGN="${HELIX_AUTO_ALIGN:-0}" \
555	    DDX_BEAD_DIR="$root/work/.ddx" \
556	    DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK=1 \
557	    bash "$repo_root/scripts/helix" "$cmd" --quiet "$@"
558	  )
559	}
560	
561	run_bead() {
562	  local root="$1"
563	  shift
564	  (
565	    cd "$root/work"
566	    HOME="$root/home" \
567	    PATH="$root/bin:$PATH" \
568	    MOCK_STATE_ROOT="$root/state" \
569	    HELIX_LIBRARY_ROOT="$repo_root/workflows" \
570	    HELIX_FORCE_EPHEMERAL=1 \
571	    DDX_BEAD_DIR="$root/work/.ddx" \
572	    DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK=1 \
573	    ddx bead "$@"
574	  )
575	}
576	
577	run_helix_with_env() {
578	  local root="$1"
579	  local env_name="$2"
580	  local env_value="$3"
581	  shift 3
582	  local cmd="${1:-help}"
583	  shift || true
584	  (
585	    cd "$root/work"
586	    env \
587	      HOME="$root/home" \
588	      PATH="$root/bin:$PATH" \
589	      MOCK_STATE_ROOT="$root/state" \
590	      HELIX_LIBRARY_ROOT="$repo_root/workflows" \
591	      "HELIX_FORCE_EPHEMERAL=1" \
592	      "HELIX_REVIEW_AGENT=codex" \
593	      "HELIX_ALT_AGENT=none" \
594	      "HELIX_AUTO_ALIGN=0" \
595	      "DDX_BEAD_DIR=$root/work/.ddx" \
596	      "DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK=1" \
597	      "HELIX_DIRECT_AGENT=1" \
598	      "$env_name=$env_value" \
599	      bash "$repo_root/scripts/helix" "$cmd" --quiet "$@"
600	  )
601	}

603	run_helix_with_envs() {

/home/erik/.local/bin/ddx
Manage beads — portable, ephemeral work items with metadata.

Beads provide a lightweight work queue for AI agents and developers.
They track tasks, dependencies, and status without coupling to any
specific workflow methodology.

Examples:
  ddx bead init                                    # Initialize bead storage
  ddx bead create "Fix auth bug" --type bug        # Create a bead
  ddx bead list --status open                      # List open beads
  ddx bead ready                                   # Show beads ready for work
  ddx bead dep add <id> <dep-id>                   # Add a dependency
  ddx bead import --from jsonl beads.jsonl          # Import from JSONL

Usage:
  ddx bead [flags]
  ddx bead [command]

Aliases:
  bead, beads

Available Commands:
  blocked     List beads blocked by deps or retry cooldowns
  close       Close a bead
  create      Create a new bead
  dep         Manage bead dependencies
  doctor      Detect (and optionally repair) beads.jsonl rows with oversized fields
  evidence    Manage append-only execution evidence
  export      Export beads as JSONL
  import      Import beads from external source
  init        Initialize bead storage
  list        List beads
  metrics     Per-bead cost, token, and attempt summaries from execution evidence
  ready       List beads ready for work (no unclosed deps)
  reopen      Reopen a closed bead
  review      Generate a review prompt for a bead's implementation
  routing     Show routing decisions recorded for a bead
  show        Show a bead
  status      Show bead counts
  update      Update a bead

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for bead

Global Flags:
      --config string              config file (default is $HOME/.ddx.yml)
      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location
  -v, --verbose                    verbose output

Use "ddx bead [command] --help" for more information about a command.

input.command: ddx bead blocked --help 2>&1 | head -40 && echo "---" && ddx bead list --help 2>&1 | head -50 && echo "---" && ddx bead update --help 2>&1 | head -50

data.output:
List beads blocked by deps or retry cooldowns

Usage:
  ddx bead blocked [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for blocked
      --json   Output as JSON

Global Flags:
      --config string              config file (default is $HOME/.ddx.yml)
      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location
  -v, --verbose                    verbose output
---
List beads

Usage:
  ddx bead list [flags]

Aliases:
  list, ls

Flags:
  -h, --help                help for list
      --json                Output as JSON
      --label string        Filter by label
      --status string       Filter by status
      --where stringArray   Filter by field value (key=value); may be repeated

Global Flags:
      --config string              config file (default is $HOME/.ddx.yml)
      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location
  -v, --verbose                    verbose output
---
Update a bead

Usage:
  ddx bead update <id> [flags]

Flags:
      --acceptance string    New acceptance criteria
      --assignee string      New assignee or claim assignee fallback
      --claim                Claim: set status=in_progress, assignee=ddx
      --description string   New description
  -h, --help                 help for update
      --labels string        New labels (comma-separated)
      --notes string         New notes
      --parent string        New parent bead ID
      --priority int         New priority
      --set stringArray      Set custom field (key=value, repeatable)
      --status string        New status (open, in_progress, closed)
      --title string         New title
      --unclaim              Unclaim: set status=open, clear assignee and claim fields
      --unset stringArray    Unset custom field (key repeatable)

Global Flags:
      --config string              config file (default is $HOME/.ddx.yml)
      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location
  -v, --verbose                    verbose output
